lanes.name: Marketing attribution warehouse
lanes.narrative: Marketing attribution spend is material but owner attribution, idle controls, and anomalous query routing are weak.
lanes.nextAction: Right-size MKT_ATTRIB_XL, tag unowned jobs, and retire unused attribution tables before the next close.

lanes.name: Product telemetry mart
lanes.narrative: Telemetry spend is defendable but needs idle-control and unused-table cleanup to stay board-readable.
lanes.nextAction: Apply auto-suspend policy, retire stale event tables, and attach weekly credit-burn evidence.

lanes.name: Finance close analytics
lanes.narrative: Finance close analytics has strong ownership, budget coverage, and query controls.
lanes.nextAction: Keep quarter-close budget thresholds and table-retention review active.

lanes.name: Customer success health scoring
lanes.narrative: Health scoring is controlled with clean attribution and low remediation backlog.
lanes.nextAction: Maintain tag checks and monthly credit-burn report.
